response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Discovered a phonetic discrepancy in the reference lyrics; Nene sings 'いっせーので' (Ready, set, go!) instead of the reference's '凛とした音で'. Corrected this via manual transcription.
2. JSON Usage: The reference lyrics were partially used but corrected using direct audio transcription to match the actual performance.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the title card 'かくれんぼ' (Hide-and-Seek) during the instrumental break as a prominent visual event, then immediately transitioned back to syncing with Nene's vocals.

subtitles.original: いっせーので鳴り響いたスタートの合図
subtitles.english: With a \"Ready, set, go!\", the starting signal resounded

subtitles.original: 何度と線で結んだ世界 色付けてく
subtitles.english: Adding color to the world we connected with lines over and over

subtitles.original: 物心が付く頃 すでにここにあった
subtitles.english: By the time I was old enough to understand, it was already here
